name: AI Video Content Planner
description: Takes a topic, uses Claude AI to generate multiple video concepts with full scripts, SEO-optimized YouTube titles and descriptions, thumbnail ideas, and production notes. Saves the plan to Google Sheets for tracking and full scripts to Google Docs.

source.originalName: Generate AI videos with Google Veo3, save to Google Drive and upload to YouTube

topic.description: Video topic or niche (e.g. 'AI productivity tools for remote workers')

videoCount.description: Number of video concepts to generate (1-10)

steps.name: Build Claude prompt for video content planning
Run Claude AI to generate video content plans
Strip code fences and parse Claude JSON output
Build Google Docs content with full scripts
Save video tracking to Google Sheets
Save full scripts to Google Docs
